landmarks.innerText: Your browser or operating system is out of date and Semrush might not be displayed correctly. Please update your browser or operating system.
Products Pricing Resources Enterprise Log In Sign Up

Features Keyword Magic Tool Keyword Magic Tool Harness the strength of a database with over 27 billion keywords. Quickly find new ranking opportunities and dive into market trends with AI-powered personalized metrics. Try It Free Take a Deep Dive into Any Topic Find all of the best keyword opportunities for your site, powered by AI. Keyword Difficulty Use our advanced keyword difficulty and PKD analysis. Get detailed insights on domains, SERP features, and backlinks. Intent Identify keywords that match your goals. Review keyword intent. Search Volume Review the average monthly searches for a keyword over a 12-month period to find the most relevant queries. Trend Monitor the level of interest in a search query and see how often a keyword has been Googled over the past 12 months. Cost Per Click Discover the average CPC for ads tied to your target keywords to budget PPC campaigns. SERP Features Assess if your website can secure SERP features for targeted keywords and identify potential rich results. Pick the most valuable keywords and create a powerful, personalized master list. Try It Free Conduct Research with One of the Market's Largest Databases Explore an AI-enhanced database for comprehensive keyword research. Use domain-specific metrics and filters to refine your strategy and create custom tailored keyword lists. 27.8B keywords 20M ideas for a single keyword 142 geo databases Cluster Your Keywords Explore Keyword Groups to Plan Your Strategy Assess each subtopic’s search volume and average difficulty to fine-tune your strategies. Try It Free Expand Your Keyword Lists Discover related keywords to identify less competitive long-tail phrases with high click-through potential. Try It Free Save All Your Keywords in One Place Streamline your keyword strategy by consolidating your lists across Semrush tools or other platforms. Plan both paid advertising campaigns and content strategy, using keyword insights to maximize marketing efforts. Save, Manage, and Export Your Master Lists Maximize your keyword research efforts. Export lists to a spreadsheet or our Keyword Strategy Builder, where you can plan a content strategy. Try It Free See Why Professionals Across Industries Love Semrush’s Keyword Magic Tool Find keywords, analyze their potential, and estimate their traffic Start Searching

GET STARTED WITH SEMRUSH TODAY Try Semrush free for seven days. Cancel anytime. Start free trial Semrush Semrush One Features Pricing Free Trial Compare Semrush Success Stories Stats and Facts Affiliate Program More tools Enterprise SEO Enterprise AIO Enterprise SI Insights24 Mfour App Center Top Websites Free Tools Sensor Company About Us News Careers Partners Semrush Select Global Issues Index Do not sell my personal info Contact Us Support Knowledge Base Academy Semrush API Community Semrush Blog Webinars Ambassador Program © 2026 Semrush Holdings. All rights reserved. Privacy Policy Terms of Service Cookies Settings English
